category_sources: Official moonrepo page describes moon as a task runner and monorepo management tool written in Rust.
source_facts.description says Moon is a task runner and repo management tool for the web ecosystem.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is moon; official moonrepo product page uses the display name moon.
docs_sources: Official moonrepo documentation site and moon product page provide dedicated documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined as instructed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly states task runner, repo management, web ecosystem, and Rust; official docs/product page support those tags.
